site.name: InBrowser.App
site.description: In-browser utilities that run without a backend server.

metadata.homeDescription: The Astro rewrite now supports localized routes, metadata, and content loading.
metadata.toolsDescription: Browse the generated tool directory and the Astro rewrite's localization model.

home.title: Localized routing is wired into the Astro shell.
home.description: Site pages and future tool pages now share one language model for routes, messages, MDX content, canonicals, alternates, and sitemap generation.
home.statusDescription: English routes stay unprefixed, non-default languages use /:lang, and metadata now resolves from the active locale instead of hard-coded strings.
home.registryTitle: Generated registries stay the source of truth
home.registryDescription: Tool detail routes come from packages/tool-registry, so new tools only need a manifest plus localized assets.
home.contentDescription: Long-form page content and tool content resolve with language fallback so static explanations stay separate from UI code.

tools.title: Tool routes are ready for localized manifests.
tools.description: The tools index now reads registry output and site translations, while future tool detail pages inherit the same fallback and metadata rules.
tools.emptyDescription: The registry is wired and validated, but the first tool archetypes land in issue #322.
tools.loadingModelDescription: Tool pages will resolve localized metadata and long-form content from the generated registry and each tool directory.

tool.clientMissing: This tool does not register a client island yet.
tool.contentMissing: This tool does not ship long-form content yet.
